steps.t: The first soldiers left behind saw Captain Lachír and his party heading east along the central road of Udûn, before turning north. You should continue…
The soldiers are just north of the central road in Udûn. You should talk to this second set of soldiers and see what you can learn of Captain Lachír.
The soldiers are just north of the central road in Udûn. Othras and his fellow-soldier asked for your help in opening hatchways in their area, in sear…
The soldiers are just north of the central road in Udûn. You should tell Mellor and Othras that these hatchways are not full of treasure - only bellig…
The soldiers are just north of the central road in Udûn. You should encourage the soldiers to stop opening the hatchways.
The soldiers are just north of the central road in Udûn. With permission to abandon their mad task, the soldiers have asked you to help by closing som…
The soldiers are just north of the central road in Udûn. Now that a number of the hatchways have been closed again, you should return to the soldiers.
